text:
Dear FreeBSD team I'd like to make an entry for my copmpany.

Hamburgnet provides you with experience in FreeBSD and OpenBSD based projects.
From low end Webservers to Highend Firewall and Database Clusters.
Storage, Server, Unix, Cluster & Consulting
